name: evolver-tools
description: 206 CLI tools + 9 flagship projects — one pip install

pricing_model.free: All 206 tools + 9 flagship — fully open source (MIT)

new_in_v24: jwt-decode — Decode JWT tokens (header + payload, no verification)
json-diff — Deep diff two JSON files, show paths that differ
world-clock — Show current time in multiple timezones
markdown-lint — Basic Markdown linting — headings, fences, whitespace, line length
gzip-cli — Gzip/gunzip files — compress, decompress, list archive contents
features: 9 flagship projects (500-1700 lines each, CLI+TUI dual mode)
Zero external dependencies across all tools
Single pip install — no version conflicts
